name: aming-claw
description: Codex plugin packaging for Aming Claw governance, launcher, HN challenge/demo skills, everyday AI coding demo skills, and MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Provides the Aming Claw governance, launcher, HN challenge/demo skills, and everyday AI coding demo skills plus MCP resources and configuration so agents start with graph-first discovery, backlog/MF discipline, core runtime checks, and dashboard governance context.
defaultPrompt: Read aming-claw://skill before changing governed code; use graph/backlog checks first.
If governance is offline, read aming-claw://seed-graph-summary, then ask user to run aming-claw start.
Call graph_query/query_schema, runtime, graph, and backlog checks before implementation.
